meta_title: For Freelancers: Git with AI to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Git with AI: Scale Your Freelance Workflow (Intermediate)
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale. Learn how to integrate Git with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to automate your freelance dev workflow and ship faster.
content.answer_block: The bottleneck in freelance development isn't code complexity, but manual overhead. By integrating AI-driven Git workflows, you treat your repository as a living agent. Using Antigravity for architectural planning and Claude Code for iterative execution, you can automate commit cycles, feature branching, and documentation, effectively scaling your output capacity.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a mounting backlog, three client Slack channels are blowing up, and your codebase has become a fragile monolith that breaks every time you touch a dependency. The dream of the 'independent developer' is rapidly curdling into a nightmare of technical debt and manual maintenance. You aren't just coding; you're drowning in Git merge conflicts and context switching.

But the professional-grade secret isn't working harder; it's offloading the orchestration of your VCS to a deterministic AI loop. By combining the structural planning of Antigravity with the autonomous execution of Claude Code, you transform your Git workflow from a chore into a high-leverage engine that scales your development velocity exponentially.

steps.title: Architectural Blueprinting
steps.description: Define the project structure before writing a single line of code. This prevents the 'spaghetti' architecture that makes scaling impossible.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project requirements and propose a modular file structure that supports future scaling and micro-service decomposition.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create the file structure defined in the architectural plan'

steps.title: Automated Semantic Commit Strategy
steps.description: Stop writing manual commit messages. Use AI to ensure every Git commit follows strict conventional commits for better tracking.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a pre-commit hook script that utilizes AI to summarize code changes into semantic commit messages.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement a husky pre-commit hook that calls a script to generate semantic commit messages'

steps.title: Context-Aware Feature Branching
steps.description: Automate branch creation to ensure team-like discipline even when you are working alone.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a shell script that prompts for a ticket ID and creates a standardized feature branch with a linked README summary.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a bash script named setup-branch.sh that initializes a new feature branch with a project-specific template'

steps.title: AI-Driven Refactoring Loops
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform massive refactors across the codebase while maintaining Git integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify all instances of legacy patterns in /src and prepare a refactoring plan that maintains backward compatibility.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Execute the refactoring plan for legacy patterns and run all unit tests to ensure no regressions'

steps.title: Automated Documentation Sync
steps.description: Keep your documentation in sync with your code changes automatically to save hours of manual maintenance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a pipeline that scans for code changes and automatically updates the relevant sections in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a workflow that triggers documentation updates on every merge to main'

pro_tips: Treat your Git history as training data; clean commits make it easier for future AI agents to understand your logic.
Use 'Claude Code' in a restricted directory mode to prevent the agent from accidentally modifying your sensitive environment variables.
Always run your test suite immediately after an AI-driven merge; AI can produce syntactically correct code that fails logically.
Store your most effective Antigravity prompts in a 'prompt-library' folder within your repo to maintain consistency across different client projects.
Use Git tags to create 'checkpoints' before running large-scale AI refactoring tasks so you can revert with precision.
content.next_steps: Integrate these scripts into your 'boilerplate' project template so that every new client project starts with this AI-ready Git infrastructure pre-configured.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your tools and start building the future of your freelance agency. Our community of high-performing developers is already using these exact workflows to double their shipping speed. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.

Stop writing manual commit messages. Use AI to ensure every Git commit follows strict conventional commits for better tracking.
Automate branch creation to ensure team-like discipline even when you are working alone.
